data.title: Stocks like Astera, Nvidia, Palantir, Robinhood, and Tesla were significant movers. Apple's iPhone event upcoming. Dow Jones Futures report by Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Stocks such as Astera, Nvidia, Palantir, Robinhood, and Tesla saw significant movement on Monday, impacting Dow Jones Futures. These companies have been highlighted as key players to watch. Investors are now looking forward to the upcoming Apple iPhone event. The market is abuzz with anticipation for the latest developments in the tech industry.

data.title: Dow rose, Nasdaq hit high, Robinhood surged, Tesla, Amazon tested buy points. Elon Musk deal impacts a stock.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a slight increase in the stock market. Robinhood witnessed a significant surge, while Tesla and Amazon reached record highs. A stock also saw a notable increase following a deal involving Elon Musk. Overall, the market performance included the Dow rising, and the Nasdaq reaching a new high. Notable movements were observed in Amazon and Tesla, as they tested attractive buy points.

data.title: EQT completes public stock offering for Waystar Holding Corp, raising $705.8 million with EQT receiving $304.5 million.
data.description: An underwritten public offering has successfully generated total proceeds of approximately USD $705.8 million, with EQT receiving around USD $304.5 million. The news was disclosed by an affiliate of EQT VIII, with the announcement made in New York on September 12, 2025.

data.title: Luxury street fashion brand NotHappening debuts in NY with Fyre Fest collaboration, highlighting social media fatigue.
data.description: Today in New York City, a new fashion brand called NotHappening has made its debut alongside a groundbreaking partnership with Fyre Fest the Musical. NotHappening is more than just a regular brand; it serves as a critique of the hype, exclusivity, and illusions prevalent in today's world. The collaboration is set to shake up the fashion scene with its unique approach. This bold venture is set to challenge the norms of the industry and offer consumers a fresh perspective on fashion. Stay tuned for more updates on this exciting collaboration.

data.title: Autos of Dallas offers research on pre-owned EVs/hybrids, simplifying path to sustainable luxury._EVs & hybrids are on the rise in luxury automotive sector.
data.description: Autos of Dallas is equipping consumers with a comprehensive resource on pre-owned electric vehicles (EVs) and hybrids, streamlining the path to eco-friendly opulence. This initiative comes amidst a swift transformation in the luxury car sector, where EVs and hybrids are gaining prominence. As of September 12, 2025, in Dallas, a significant shift is noted in consumer preferences towards sustainable transportation options, with EVs and hybrids taking center stage. The dealership is focused on providing a sophisticated guide to aid buyers in opting for environmentally conscious luxury vehicles. This proactive approach addresses the growing demand for sustainable choices in the automotive market, ensuring a smoother transition towards adopting greener technologies.

data.title: Dr. Luyuan Fang, CEO of Curative AI, wins Asian American Entrepreneurial Achievement Award for visionary leadership.
data.description: In Seattle on September 12, 2025, Dr. Luyuan Fang, the Founder and CEO of Curative AI, received the Asian American Entrepreneurial Achievement Award. This accolade is granted to exemplary leaders like Dr. Fang who are revolutionizing various sectors through their innovative approaches. This recognition highlights Dr. Fang’s exceptional contributions to the industry.

data.title: Denison Mines Corp. to increase investment in Foremost Clean Energy Ltd. Early warning report to be filed. [84 characters]
data.description: Denison Mines Corp. (TSX: DML) (NYSE American: DNN) recently disclosed its additional investment in Foremost Clean Energy Ltd. (NASDAQ: FMST) (CSE: FAT) as a part of its Investor Rights agreement. The company's move signifies a significant step towards strengthening its position in the clean energy sector. This strategic investment showcases Denison's commitment to expanding its presence in the market and embracing sustainable energy solutions. The partnership between Denison Mines Corp. and Foremost Clean Energy Ltd. sets the stage for increased collaboration in advancing clean energy initiatives.

data.title: IICA urges action to empower rural youth in Latin America & the Caribbean to transform migration trends.
data.description: In an effort to reshape migration patterns and promote sustainability, a fresh initiative aims to create prospects for future generations in San José, Costa Rica. Dated September 12, 2025, the Inter-American Institute for Cooperation on Agriculture (IICA) is calling on authorities, businesses, and stakeholders to collaborate on this vision. The proposal seeks to tackle migration trends and establish a more stable environment by fostering growth and development.

data.title: Hithium showcases AI Data Center solution at RE+ 2025, displaying BESS solutions, highlighting industry leadership.
data.description: At the RE+ 2025 event in Las Vegas from September 8 to 11, 2025, Hithium, a prominent player in energy storage technology, presented its latest innovations. The company showcased its comprehensive BESS solutions and introduced a new specialized AIDC technology. This event allowed Hithium to highlight its advancements in the industry, reaching a global audience.

data.title: AlphaVest Acquisition Corp clarifies redemption procedures in supplement to proxy materials for Extraordinary General Meeting on Sept. 19, 2025.
data.description: On September 12, 2025, in New York City, AlphaVest Acquisition Corp submitted a Proxy Supplement to its proxy statement dated September 2, 2025. The supplement is in connection to the Extraordinary General Meeting scheduled for September 19, 2025, known as the Extension Meeting. During this meeting, shareholders will have the opportunity to review and vote on a resolution to prolong the duration for finalizing the business merger, referred to as the Extension.

data.title: Prime Drink Group Corp (CSE: PRME) announces MCTO extension to file annual financial statements by September 29, 2025.
data.description: Montreal-based Prime Drink Group Corp. (CSE: PRME) has voluntarily applied for and received a management cease trade order (MCTO) from the British Columbia Securities Commission on July 30, 2025, extending the deadline for filing its annual financial statements for the period ended March 31, 2025. Originally due on July 29, the new deadline for the Annual Financial Filings is now September 29, 2025. This development follows previous news releases issued by the Company on July 30, August 15, and August 29, 2025.

data.title: France's debt rating downgraded due to rising political instability, as Fitch Ratings points to increased polarization.
data.description: Fitch Ratings downgraded the credit rating of the highly indebted country, attributing it to the growing fragmentation and polarization in politics.

data.title: Sidus Space plans public offering to sell shares of Class A common stock (Nasdaq: SIDU) in best-efforts sale.
data.description: Sidus Space, Inc., a space and defense technology company traded on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol SIDU, revealed plans to conduct a best-efforts public offering. The company aims to sell shares of its Class A common stock, along with pre-funded warrants, to raise capital. Sidus specializes in providing adaptable and cost-efficient solutions for various sectors, including government, defense, intelligence, and commercial entities worldwide. This move signifies an expansion strategy for the company to secure funds for future endeavors and growth opportunities.
U.S. imposes sanctions on Sudanese Finance Minister Jibril Ibrahim and Lieutenant General Al-Burak bin Malik - reports

data.title: Eric Jackson believes Opendoor Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: OPEN) could be the Amazon of housing. Stock experienced pullback, with key management changes supporting a bullish outlook.
data.description: Is Opendoor Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: OPEN) positioned to become the housing industry's equivalent of Amazon? Eric Jackson, a prominent stock promoter, seems to think so. Despite a pullback in OPEN stock on Friday, there is growing optimism surrounding the company. Jackson outlined a bullish case for Opendoor, emphasizing recent management changes as a significant factor in his positive outlook. He highlighted the transformation in leadership as a key pillar supporting his optimism for the stock. During the Independent Investor Summit, Jackson presented his optimistic vision for the company, citing the resolved management question. For more details on this story, visit the full coverage on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Avicanna appoints Nick Hilborn as Interim CFO, replacing Phillip Cardella who transitions to consultant on Sept 15, 2025.
data.description: In Toronto on September 12, 2025, Avicanna Inc. (TSX: AVCN) (OTCQX: AVCNF) (FSE: 0NN), a biopharmaceutical firm specializing in plant-derived cannabinoid-based products, has appointed Nick Hilborn, CPA, CA, as the Interim Chief Financial Officer. This announcement follows the transition of Phillip Cardella, CPA, CA, to a consultant role effective Monday, September 15, 2025.

data.title: Cameco signs 15-year UF6 supply agreement with Slovenské elektrárne for Slovakia plants, ensuring source until 2036.
data.description: Cameco (TSX: CCO; NYSE: CCJ) has recently solidified a long-term contract to provide natural uranium hexafluoride (UF6) to Slovenské elektrárne (SE), a Slovakian energy company, for its nuclear power plants. The agreement encompasses uranium and conversion services and is set to run until 2036, ensuring a stable supply of natural UF6 for SE. This partnership will aid SE's operations at the Bohunice and Mochovce nuclear facilities, commencing in 2028.

data.title: AYR Wellness filed Q1 2025 financial statements & MD&A, for 3 months ending March 31, 2025.
data.description: On September 12, 2025, AYR Wellness Inc., a prominent U.S. multi-state cannabis operator, disclosed that it submitted its unaudited interim condensed consolidated financial statements for the quarter concluding on March 31, 2025, alongside the corresponding Management’s Discussion and Analysis (MD&A). The company is listed as CSE: AYR.A and OTCQX: AYRWF.

data.title: Tron's 64% revenue drop in 10 days after gas fee cut still puts it ahead of Ethereum, Solana, and BNB Chain in revenue.
data.description: Despite recent adjustments, Tron remains the top revenue generator among layer-1 blockchains, surpassing competitors like Ethereum, Solana, and BNB Chain. Its revenue outshines other platforms, highlighting its strong position in the market.

data.title: Steward Partners ranked #9 on Barron's Top 100 RIA Firms list, marking 6 years of recognition, showing firm's upward trajectory.
data.description: Steward Partners, an independent financial services firm based in Stamford, Connecticut, has shown significant progress by moving up in the rankings. The firm's dedication to ensuring client success is evident through this positive development. Specializing in delivering comprehensive wealth management solutions, Steward Partners' recent performance highlights its ongoing momentum and commitment. This update was announced on September 12, 2025.
